Props.Text: $$SERVER$:$WELCOME_TO_SERVER
$$SERVER$:$SERVER_SLOGAN
Q: What kind of server is this?
A: A Vanilla-like PvE server with carefully selected Quality of Life mods.

Props.Title: What do we mean by that?

Props.Text: Our goal is to preserve the core ARK experience while reducing unnecessary frustrations. We avoid heavily modded gameplay that drastically changes progression, creatures, or balance. Instead, we focus on Quality of Life improvements that make the game more enjoyable without taking away the challenge and satisfaction of survival.
Q: What maps are available?
A: Valguero is currently the only map available.

The server is currently focused on Valguero to help build a strong and active community in one place. As the community grows, additional maps may be added based on player interest and demand. If the server becomes consistently active and receives enough support through donations, we may also expand by increasing the player slot count and adding additional servers for other maps. Our goal is to grow alongside the community while maintaining a stable and enjoyable experience for everyone.
Q: Can I play solo?
A: Absolutely! Solo players are fully supported.

While the server allows tribes of up to 4 players, solo survivors can still progress comfortably. We use the Solo Farm Mod to make gathering resources easier when playing alone, helping solo players stay competitive without needing a large tribe. Whether you prefer to play by yourself or with friends, you'll be able to enjoy the full PvE experience.
Q: Are there any rules I need to follow?
A: Yes, but they are super simple! You will find them in the Rules and Guides Tab!
Q: How do I report a player for breaking the rules?

A: Please report rule violations through the Discord server. You can use the #support-Channel for this! False reports or reports made in bad faith may result in action being taken against the reporter.
Q: Can I bring my friends to the server?

A: Absolutely! Friends are welcome to join and play together. Please remember that the maximum tribe size is 4 players. The tribe limit exists to help keep the server balanced and encourage more players and tribes to join, rather than having a few large tribes take up most of the server population. We want everyone to have the opportunity to build, progress, and be part of the community, especially while the server is limited to 20 slots. All players are expected to follow the server rules and help maintain a friendly PvE environment.
Q: Is there a Discord server for the community?
A: Yes! You can join via the Button on the Home Page!.
Q: Can I suggest changes or improvements for the server?

A: Absolutely! Player feedback is always welcome. If you have ideas for server settings, quality-of-life improvements, events, mods, future maps, or other changes, feel free to share them in the Discord server. While not every suggestion can be implemented, all feedback will be considered. Our goal is to build a fun and enjoyable community-driven server, and player input helps us improve the experience for everyone.
Q: How do I contact the server admins?
A: You can contact the server admins through the Discord server. Ideally, create a ticket in the #support Channel. For general questions, use the #questions channel.

We hope this FAQ answers your questions and helps you plant your roots here at STRAWBEE. If you need anything else, don't hesitate to reach out to our community or staff. Happy surviving, and may your tribe continue to grow!
This page is fairly new and can still contain spelling or grammar mistakes!
1. Tribe Limit: Maximum tribe size: 4 players
2. Respect Others: e respectful to all players and staff. Respect other players' bases, tames, and property. No griefing, harassment, or intentionally ruining another player's experience.

3. Building & Resources: Building in caves is allowed. Do not block important resource spawns, including:  Metal,  Crystal, Obsidian. Oil and Other valuable resource nodes.Do not build on Beaver Dam spawn locations. Also dont block:  Artifact access, Boss terminals,  Obelisks, Major travel routes and Avoid excessive pillar or foundation spam used solely to reserve land.

4. Server Maintenance: Inactive bases, structures, and tames may be removed to keep the map clean and available for active players. Keep base sizes and tame counts reasonable to help maintain server performance.
5. Bugs & Exploits: Report any bugs, glitches, or issues you discover. Cheats, hacks, exploits, mesh abuse, and other unfair advantages are strictly prohibited.
7. Community: Have fun. Help other players when you can and contribute to a positive and welcoming community.
